config.html:
Scaffold từ DQHF — form gốc: frmWarehouseOutputEdit, frmDanhSachXuatKho, frmXuatKho
Nút WinForms gốc: Đóng · Lưu
Nút cần gắn thêm: Xoá (procedure/records.delete) · In (cần print template entity) · Xuất (export)
Proc cần port: TR_CTPHIEUXUAT_DELETE, TR_CTPHIEUXUAT_GET, TR_CTPHIEUXUAT_UPDATE2, TR_CTPHIEUXUAT_UPDATE3, TR_PHIEUXUAT_GET, TR_PHIEUXUAT_UPDATE, HR_CONGTY_GET, TR_CTPHIEUXUAT_GETALL, TR_PHIEUNXUAT_PRINT, TR_PHIEUXUAT_GETALL
Entity phụ (lookup/filter cân nhắc thêm): tr_ctphieuxuat, tr_dexuat_bangmau, tr_dondathang, tr_hehang, tr_khachhang, tr_lenhcapphat_head, tr_material, tr_order, tr_order_replacement, tr_phieuxuat, tr_phieuyeucau, tr_phieuyeucau_chitiet, tr_phieuyeucau_muahang, tr_reftype, tr_site
